description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage, suggesting high-speed capability. The wings are swept back aggressively and feature angular, blade-like extensions, giving the aircraft a predatory, advanced appearance. Twin engines are mounted at the rear, with visible blue exhausts, and the tail section is sharply angled with a twin vertical stabilizer configuration. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The surface is primarily metallic gray with dark red and black accents, and the overall design is reminiscent of a high-performance military or sci-fi fighter jet. No visible landing gear is present, indicating it may be retracted or designed for flight display.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear engines, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Its metallic gray body is accented with dark red and black, giving it a high-tech, aggressive look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and wide, swept-back wings with angular extensions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit canopy, and the sharply swept wings with rear-mounted engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin blue engine exhausts, angular tail section, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the same swept wing and engine configuration, emphasizing the aircraft's symmetry and aggressive lines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, highly swept with angular extensions and slight anhedral; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted with visible exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail (H-tail) with sharply angled surfaces.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
